const switchChains = () => {
    const temp = fromChain
    setFromChain(toChain)
    setToChain(temp)
    
    const tempToken = fromToken
    setFromToken(toToken)
    setToToken(tempToken)
    
    const tempAmount = fromAmount
    setFromAmount(toAmount)
    setToAmount(tempAmount)
  }
